services_company_ratio.transformation_logic: Fraction of total career months spent at consulting/services firms ( TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Accenture, Cognizant, Capgemini, HCL, Tech Mahindra, L&T, Deloitte, PwC, KPMG, EY, Genpact, etc.).

product_company_ratio.transformation_logic: Complement of services_company_ratio (1.0 - services_company_ratio). Represents product focus.

startup_company_ratio.transformation_logic: Fraction of total career months spent at startup sized firms (1-10, 11-50, 51-200, 201-500 size classes).

enterprise_company_ratio.transformation_logic: Fraction of total career months spent at enterprise sized firms (5001-10000, 10001+ size classes).

career_stability_score.transformation_logic: Nonlinear score scaling based on average tenure across roles, penalized by the number of short jobs (< 12 months duration).

notice_period_score.transformation_logic: Continuous score thresholding (1.0 for immediate, 0.9 for <=15 days, 0.75 for <=30 days, 0.4 for <=60 days, 0.1 for 90+ days).

domain_relevance_score.transformation_logic: Hierarchical match count of domain keywords grouped into search-ranking (Tier 1), ML/NLP (Tier 2), and general engineering (Tier 3), boosted by target titles and discounted for irrelevant domains.

promotion_trajectory_score.transformation_logic: Upward progression metric checking if seniority levels (Junior=0.5, Standard=1.0, Senior=2.0, Executive/Principal=3.0) increase over chronological timeline.

evidence_strength.transformation_logic: Average verification confidence score computed across all target competencies in the Evidence Ledger.

impact_extraction_score.transformation_logic: Density rating of quantitative metric regex patterns matched in candidate descriptions (percentages, latency times, user scale numbers).

credibility_score.transformation_logic: Continuous, cap-floored score starting at 1.0, reduced by temporal overlap penalties, salary discrepancies, duration inflation, and honeypot traps.

rrf_retrieval_score.transformation_logic: Unified reciprocal rank fusion score fuzing lexical and semantic rankings.

bm25_retrieval_score.transformation_logic: Raw scoring similarity output from rank_bm25 lexical engine.

dense_retrieval_score.transformation_logic: Raw SentenceTransformer cosine similarity score calculated for the candidate summary profile.

retrieval_rank_percentile.transformation_logic: Normalized percentile rank within the reciprocal rank fusion retrieval pool (1.0 - rank/pool_size).

jd_title_similarity.transformation_logic: Jaccard intersection over union word similarity check between job description title and candidate's held titles.

jd_summary_similarity.transformation_logic: Normalized word overlap between target competencies semantic keywords and candidate professional summary.

competency_coverage.transformation_logic: Ratio of verified hiring competencies to the total rubric competencies.

skill_overlap_ratio.transformation_logic: Validated matching skill ratio checking cross-source support for JD target skills.

relevant_experience_years.transformation_logic: Sum of experience durations (in years) restricted to roles that contain ML, Search, Ranking, or AI keywords.

average_tenure_years.transformation_logic: Average duration in years per job in professional history.

career_continuity_score.transformation_logic: Penalizes gaps between chronological experience records longer than 3 months.

promotion_velocity.transformation_logic: Number of senior titles held divided by total career duration in years.

leadership_indicator_score.transformation_logic: Highest leadership seniority indicator score matched from career titles (Lead=0.6, Senior=0.3, Exec/VP=1.0).

technical_specialization_trend.transformation_logic: Compares domain keywords matching in the latest role description to the earliest role to detect increasing specialization over time.

num_verified_skills.transformation_logic: Count of declared skills that are successfully corroborated across at least 2 independent sections.

cross_source_verification_count.transformation_logic: Count of skills supported by multiple sources. Perfect duplicate of num_verified_skills.

skill_diversity_score.transformation_logic: Fraction of distinct engineering domains (ML/NLP, Backend/Cloud, Data Engineering, Search/IR) covered by verified skills.

skill_recency_score.transformation_logic: Ratio of verified skills that are active (mentioned) in the current or latest job description.

skill_longevity_score.transformation_logic: Capped total months of experience summed across all verified skill audits.

notice_period_normalized.transformation_logic: Linear scaling of notice days capped at 90 days (1.0 - notice_days/90.0).

relocation_willingness.transformation_logic: Binary float indicator (1.0 for willing, 0.0 for unwilling).

availability_indicator.transformation_logic: Binary float indicator representing open to work status.

timeline_consistency.transformation_logic: Complement score of the credibility penalty (1.0 - penalty/2.0). Highly correlated with credibility score.

contradiction_count.transformation_logic: Count of validation warnings generated during consistency checks.

cross_field_agreement.transformation_logic: Step function penalized to 0.5 if stated YOE exceeds chronological start dates, else 1.0.

quantitative_achievement_count.transformation_logic: Raw count of quantitative metric match instances.

performance_metric_mentions.transformation_logic: Raw count of search and ML performance keywords (NDCG, MAP, latency, F1-score, accuracy).
